title: opendnssec bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.1.10-3]
- Don't package files in obsoleted /var/run
  Resolves: RHEL-4866

[2.1.10-3]
- Exclude i686 arch, as there's no OpenJDK 17 for this arch
  Resolves: RHEL-75905

[2.1.10-2]
- Use systemd-sysusers to create users
  Resolves: RHEL-75905
full_text:
[2.1.10-3]
- Don't package files in obsoleted /var/run
  Resolves: RHEL-4866

[2.1.10-3]
- Exclude i686 arch, as there's no OpenJDK 17 for this arch
  Resolves: RHEL-75905

[2.1.10-2]
- Use systemd-sysusers to create users
  Resolves: RHEL-75905

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20840.html
